# 🚀 CatchBan V2.0 Beta: The "Creator's Workspace" Update
> **PUBLIC BETA:** CatchBan V2.0 Beta is now available to all creators for free.
> This is the biggest product upgrade in CatchBan so far. It has evolved from a single-purpose downloader into a complete local workspace for collecting, organizing, previewing, and preparing media for production.
>
> **公开测试中：** CatchBan V2.0 Beta 现已向所有创作者免费开放。
> 这是 CatchBan 迄今为止最大的一次系统升级。它已经从单一的视频下载工具，升级为面向视频创作者的素材库工作台，让采集、整理、预览与输出进入同一条本地工作流。

---

## ✨ New in V2.0 Beta (V2.0 Beta 全新升级)

Major architecture upgrades to turn CatchBan into a real creator workflow workspace.  
通过系统级架构升级，CatchBan 正式成为服务创作者真实工作流的素材库工作台。

### 🗂 Creator Library Workspace (创作者素材库工作台)
- **Local-First Workspace:** Downloaded clips, existing local videos, and exported results can now live in one unified workspace.
- **本地优先工作台：** 下载内容、本地视频与导出结果现在都可以统一归档到同一个本地工作台中。
- **Organized for Reuse:** Organize media by project, topic, or stage so assets stay reusable instead of getting lost in folders.
- **按工作流组织：** 可按项目、主题与阶段管理素材，让资产更容易复用，而不是散落在文件夹中。

### 🎥 4K Capture & Browser-Assisted Verification (4K 采集与浏览器辅助验证)
- **4K Ready:** Supports 4K video downloads where available, with more flexible quality selection.
- **支持 4K：** 在源站支持的前提下可下载 4K 高清视频，并提供更灵活的清晰度选择。
- **Browser-Assisted Capture:** Built-in browser-assisted verification helps handle more complex capture scenarios with higher success rates.
- **浏览器辅助验证：** 内置浏览器辅助验证能力，可应对更复杂的采集场景并提升成功率。

### 👀 Native Preview & Frame Review (原生预览与逐帧检视)
- **Workspace Preview:** Preview clips directly inside CatchBan instead of bouncing between Finder and external players.
- **工作台内预览：** 可直接在 CatchBan 内部预览素材，减少 Finder 与外部播放器之间的来回切换。
- **Shot Selection Faster:** Improved frame-by-frame review and key frame inspection make it easier to screen shots and pick highlights.
- **更快筛镜头：** 优化逐帧查看与关键帧检视链路，回看重点与挑选素材更高效。

### 🧰 Creative Toolbox (创作工具箱)
- **Fast Utility Set:** Includes H.264 conversion, clip export, GIF export, frame capture, audio extraction, and batch thumbnail generation.
- **高频工具集：** 内置 H.264 转码、片段导出、GIF 导出、关键帧抓取、音频提取与批量缩略图能力。
- **Ready for Production:** Turns collected references into usable creative assets much faster.
- **直接进入创作：** 让下载和收藏来的参考素材更快进入“可创作状态”。

### 🧠 Workflow Intelligence (工作流智能整理)
- **Library Intelligence:** Adds global search, recent items, Inbox, duplicate candidates, and same-source grouping suggestions.
- **素材库智能整理：** 新增全库搜索、最近记录、Inbox、重复候选与同来源归档建议。
- **Built for Heavy Use:** Better suited for creators managing large volumes of reference material every day.
- **面向高频使用：** 更适合长期管理大量参考素材的创作者工作流。

### 🎬 Post-Production Ready (无缝衔接后期)
- **Edit Pipeline Ready:** Selected clips can flow directly into Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, Final Cut Pro, and other editing tools.
- **可直接进入后期：** 选定素材可无缝衔接 Premiere Pro、DaVinci Resolve、Final Cut Pro 等剪辑工具。
- **Shorter Distance to Output:** Greatly reduces the time between finding a reference and entering the edit.
- **缩短输出路径：** 明显缩短从“发现参考”到“进入剪辑”的距离。

### ♻️ Data Continuity (素材与结构可延续)
- **Library Continuity:** Existing local library structures and assets can continue into future versions.
- **素材可延续：** 现有本地素材库结构与资产可延续到后续版本。
- **Beta with Momentum:** CatchBan V2.0 Beta is free today and will continue evolving rapidly with creator feedback.
- **持续迭代：** CatchBan V2.0 Beta 当前免费开放，并将继续依据创作者反馈快速演进。

---

## 🛠 Installation (安装说明)

1. **Download the App:** Download the latest `.dmg` from **CatchBan.com** [https://catchban.com](https://catchban.com) (Recommended) or Releases [https://github.com/Banansky-Studio/CatchBan/releases](https://github.com/Banansky-Studio/CatchBan/releases).  
   **下载安装包：** 从 **CatchBan.com** [https://catchban.com](https://catchban.com)（推荐）或 GitHub Releases [https://github.com/Banansky-Studio/CatchBan/releases](https://github.com/Banansky-Studio/CatchBan/releases) 下载最新 `.dmg`。
2. **Move to Applications:** Drag `CatchBan.app` to Applications.  
   **移动到应用程序：** 将 `CatchBan.app` 拖入 `Applications`。
3. **If macOS blocks the app or shows a security warning:**  
   **如果 macOS 出现安全提示：**
   - Open `System Settings -> Privacy & Security`  
     前往 `系统设置 -> 隐私与安全性`
   - Click `Open Anyway` / `仍要打开`  
     点击 `Open Anyway` / `仍要打开`

---

## ⚖️ Disclaimer (免责声明)

This software is for **lawful reference collection, technical research, and personal archiving only**.  
本软件仅用于 **合法前提下的参考素材采集、技术研究与个人归档**。

Please **DO NOT** use it to acquire, distribute, or process copyrighted content without authorization. Users are solely responsible for any legal consequences.  
请 **不要** 在未获授权的情况下获取、传播或处理受版权保护的内容。由此产生的法律责任由使用者自行承担。
